parameters.query:
INSERT INTO alerts (alert_type, job_key, application_id, company_id, detail, source_url, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.alert_type }}',
  '{{ $json.job_key || null }}',
  '{{ $json.application_id || null }}',
  '{{ $json.company_id || null }}',
  '{{ $json.detail }}',
  '{{ $json.source_url || null }}',
  '{{ new Date().toISOString() }}'
);
